description: A hand-drawn gauge/bar that fills or drains (green->red), with a marker.
whenToUse: A level/quantity that rises or falls over the beat (oxygen level, stress, food supply).
generalize: The gauge label, direction (fill/drain), and colours are SLOTS.
produces: Gauge composition draws the dial/bar + animates the fill; label = gpt-image-2 lettering.
styleLock: Gauge structure is drawn in the house style; label = gpt-image-2 lettering.
rules: Animate the fill/drain over the beat.
